features: Large Red Santa Sack Stocking For Gifts
This Santa's sack is perfect for Christmas morning, fill with presents for little ones to open.
The sack features 'Special Delivery From Santa' printed on the front with a print of Santa himself next to it!
The bag is lightweight and has more than enough room to fill with presents.
